title: santaloides anomala
intro: Santaloides anomala, also known as the Anomalous Sandalwood or Australian Sandalwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae, native to Western Australia. It is valued for its woody, sandalwood-like heartwood, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Santaloides anomala is often used in the form of essential oils, extracts, or powdered heartwood, which can be incorporated into aromatherapy products, teas, or capsules.
